zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Cranfield於1552年5月出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾蕾托 蒙登時，她的父親William Cranfield28歲，母親Joan Ratcliffe32歲。她於1576年12月23日與John Kirby在英國賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1640年10月29日在英國賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東享年88歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Cranfield于1552年5月出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾蕾托 蒙登时，她的父亲William Cranfield28岁，母亲Joan Ratcliffe32岁。她于1576年12月23日与John Kirby在英国賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1640年10月29日在英国賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東享年88岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東。

nameMeanings.name: Cranfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Bedfordshire named Cranfield, from Old English cran(uc) ‘crane’ + feld ‘open country’.

variants.name: Cranfill
meanings: English: probably a local (Cambridgeshire) variant of   Cranfield  . It is apparently no longer found in Britain. In the US, it is found mainly in NC, TX, and IN.

variants.name: Cornfield
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Cranfield  .
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish or German   Kornfeld  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Cranfield was born in May 1552, in Little Munden, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Cranfield, was 28 and her mother, Joan Ratcliffe, was 32. She married John Kirby on 23 December 1576, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 29 October 1640, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Cranfield est née en mai 1552, à Little Munden, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Cranfield, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Ratcliffe, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John Kirby le 23 décembre 1576, à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 octobre 1640, à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Cranfield im Mai 1552 in Little Munden, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Cranfield 28 und ihre Mutter Joan Ratcliffe 32. Sie hat am 23. Dezember 1576 in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England John Kirby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Oktober 1640 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Cranfieldが1552年5月にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアリットル ムンデンで生まれた時，父William Cranfieldは28歳，母Joan Ratcliffeは32歳であった。1576年12月23日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンでJohn Kirbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1640年10月29日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンで88歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤
ko.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Cranfield(이)가 1552년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 리틀 먼든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Cranfield(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Ratcliffe(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1576년 12월 23일 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 John Kirby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1640년 10월 29일 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Cranfield nasceu em maio de 1552, em Little Munden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Cranfield, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Ratcliffe, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John Kirby em 23 de dezembro de 1576, em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1640, em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England,: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Cranfield родилась май 1552 г. в местности литл мунден, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Cranfield было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Ratcliffe, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Kirby 23 декабря 1576 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 29 октября 1640 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England: Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England,: Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Little Munden, Hertfordshire, England, U: Little Munden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Cranfield nació en mayo de 1552, en Little Munden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Cranfield, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan Ratcliffe, tenía 32 años. Se casó con John Kirby el 23 de diciembre de 1576, en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1640, en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
